{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323005513BA2F0026F61B871B2D3A"}"},"total":29},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7562704018218222360","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"偶尔放松一下没毛病，这本书爽点就在刷新的美食以及主角摆摊的地点，完成任务之后会更新美食以及地点，主角只能在固定地点卖固定美食，还有就是粉丝搜查主角摆摊位置的剧情，其他的没啥看点跳过就行了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760833731,"group_id":"7552123562845293593","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生活已经很苦了，看小说还不让爽，那生活有什么意思","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzdXYIhz+E1cXU5m8LCS5C1YIOdxP7MjRTECeuQn3Mjx","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5931850e97c646229431275c7416cad8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795994&x-signature=kH4GMUK76iuSe36wLX3XNAInmvc%3D","user_id":"2933944950460247","user_name":"君子四艺"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2933944950460247","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7552123562845293593","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食日常】【无女主无CP】【温馨治愈】【轻松搞怪】
　　失业青年方牧，意外绑定最强美食系统！
　　随机摊位！随机美食！
　　今天炒饭明天猪蹄，全看系统心情！
　　方牧做的美食香到离谱，一口入魂，吃过的人直接上瘾。
　　可他出摊时间不固定，收摊说走就走，任性到没边。
　　食客们被他折磨得死去活来，又爱又恨欲罢不能：
　　“老板别跑！再卖我一份炒饭吧！”
　　“救命！再吃不到老板做的猪蹄我要疯了！”
　　“又换地方？我马上全城搜捕！”
　　“又没吃到方老板做的美食，我今天白过了！”
　　本以为是折磨，没想到追着吃饭，竟成了所有人每天的期待。
　　随缘摆摊，治愈人间，越看越饿，越看越上头！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4bc8cd9d668e763fde2c45dc2eee10f2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"桂月君","author_id":"","book_id":"7552123562845293593","book_name":"随机美食，食客求我别收摊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6796人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7552124559613231640","read_count":"6796","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"421146"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"198","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能,美食,系统,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o4bc8cd9d668e763fde2c45dc2eee10f2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382513&x-signature=r4A%2Feum7U%2BAmFRuHXRaeuEgziHI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2063141035056391","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"84"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323005513BA2F0026F61B871B2D3A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":
